code:
// 교육용 빅뱅 시뮬레이션 - 4단계 동시 표시 형식
import*as THREE from"three";/**
 * 1️⃣ 쿼크-글루온 플라즈마
 * 극도로 뜨거운 상태 - 중앙 뭉치 + 주변 회전 궤도
 */export function createStage0_QuarkGluonPlasma(){const group=new THREE.Group();const time=Date.now()*0.001;// 중앙 뭉치 (100k 입자)
const coreGeom=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const numCore=100000;const corePos=new Float32Array(numCore*3);const coreCol=new Float32Array(numCore*3);for(let i=0;i<numCore;i++){const r=Math.pow(Math.random(),0.33)*8;const theta=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;const phi=Math.random()*Math.PI;corePos[i*3]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.cos(theta);corePos[i*3+1]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.sin(theta);corePos[i*3+2]=r*Math.cos(phi);const colorType=Math.floor(Math.random()*4);if(colorType===0){coreCol[i*3]=1.0;coreCol[i*3+1]=0.3;coreCol[i*3+2]=0.3;}else if(colorType===1){coreCol[i*3]=0.3;coreCol[i*3+1]=0.5;coreCol[i*3+2]=1.0;}else if(colorType===2){coreCol[i*3]=0.3;coreCol[i*3+1]=1.0;coreCol[i*3+2]=0.3;}else{coreCol[i*3]=1.0;coreCol[i*3+1]=1.0;coreCol[i*3+2]=0.3;}}coreGeom.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(corePos,3));coreGeom.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(coreCol,3));const coreMat=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:0.3,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:0.9});const corePoints=new THREE.Points(coreGeom,coreMat);group.add(corePoints);// 3개 궤도
const orbits=[{radius:30,color:[1.0,0.3,0.3],count:50000},{radius:50,color:[0.3,0.5,1.0],count:50000},{radius:70,color:[0.3,1.0,0.3],count:50000}];orbits.forEach((orbit,idx)=>{const geom=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const pos=new Float32Array(orbit.count*3);const col=new Float32Array(orbit.count*3);for(let i=0;i<orbit.count;i++){const baseAngle=i/orbit.count*Math.PI*2;const angle=baseAngle+time*(idx+0.5);const tilt=idx/3*Math.PI*0.2;pos[i*3]=Math.cos(angle)*orbit.radius;pos[i*3+1]=Math.sin(angle)*orbit.radius*Math.cos(tilt);pos[i*3+2]=Math.sin(angle)*orbit.radius*Math.sin(tilt);col[i*3]=orbit.color[0];col[i*3+1]=orbit.color[1];col[i*3+2]=orbit.color[2];}geom.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(pos,3));geom.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(col,3));const mat=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:0.2,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:0.7});const points=new THREE.Points(geom,mat);group.add(points);});group.userData.isAnimated=true;return group;}/**
 * 2️⃣ 쿼크 결합 → 양성자/중성자
 * 쿼크들이 결합하기 시작
 */export function createStage1_QuarkCombination(){const group=new THREE.Group();// 더 큰 중앙 핵 (쿼크 결합됨)
const coreGeom=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const numCore=150000;const corePos=new Float32Array(numCore*3);const coreCol=new Float32Array(numCore*3);for(let i=0;i<numCore;i++){const r=Math.pow(Math.random(),0.33)*12;const theta=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;const phi=Math.random()*Math.PI;corePos[i*3]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.cos(theta);corePos[i*3+1]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.sin(theta);corePos[i*3+2]=r*Math.cos(phi);if(Math.random()>0.5){coreCol[i*3]=1.0;coreCol[i*3+1]=0.3;coreCol[i*3+2]=0.3;}else{coreCol[i*3]=0.3;coreCol[i*3+1]=0.5;coreCol[i*3+2]=1.0;}}coreGeom.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(corePos,3));coreGeom.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(coreCol,3));const coreMat=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:0.4,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:0.8});const corePoints=new THREE.Points(coreGeom,coreMat);group.add(corePoints);// 2개 궤도 (쿼크들이 접근중)
const orbits=[{radius:25,color:[1.0,0.5,0.5],count:40000},{radius:40,color:[0.5,0.7,1.0],count:40000}];orbits.forEach((orbit,idx)=>{const geom=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const pos=new Float32Array(orbit.count*3);const col=new Float32Array(orbit.count*3);for(let i=0;i<orbit.count;i++){const angle=i/orbit.count*Math.PI*2;const tilt=idx/2*Math.PI*0.25;pos[i*3]=Math.cos(angle)*orbit.radius;pos[i*3+1]=Math.sin(angle)*orbit.radius*Math.cos(tilt);pos[i*3+2]=Math.sin(angle)*orbit.radius*Math.sin(tilt);col[i*3]=orbit.color[0];col[i*3+1]=orbit.color[1];col[i*3+2]=orbit.color[2];}geom.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(pos,3));geom.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(col,3));const mat=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:0.25,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:0.6});const points=new THREE.Points(geom,mat);group.add(points);});return group;}/**
 * 3️⃣ 핵융합 → 원자핵 형성
 * 양성자/중성자가 융합하여 원자핵 형성 (He-4, Li, Be)
 */export function createStage2_Nucleosynthesis(){const group=new THREE.Group();// 더 큰 원자핵 (핵융합됨)
const coreGeom=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const numCore=200000;const corePos=new Float32Array(numCore*3);const coreCol=new Float32Array(numCore*3);for(let i=0;i<numCore;i++){const r=Math.pow(Math.random(),0.33)*15;const theta=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;const phi=Math.random()*Math.PI;corePos[i*3]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.cos(theta);corePos[i*3+1]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.sin(theta);corePos[i*3+2]=r*Math.cos(phi);const colorType=Math.floor(Math.random()*3);if(colorType===0){coreCol[i*3]=0.2;coreCol[i*3+1]=1.0;coreCol[i*3+2]=1.0;}else if(colorType===1){coreCol[i*3]=0.3;coreCol[i*3+1]=1.0;coreCol[i*3+2]=0.3;}else{coreCol[i*3]=1.0;coreCol[i*3+1]=1.0;coreCol[i*3+2]=0.3;}}coreGeom.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(corePos,3));coreGeom.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(coreCol,3));const coreMat=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:0.5,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:0.85});const corePoints=new THREE.Points(coreGeom,coreMat);group.add(corePoints);// 1개 궤도 (대부분 중심으로 모임)
const orbitGeom=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const orbitPos=new Float32Array(30000*3);const orbitCol=new Float32Array(30000*3);for(let i=0;i<30000;i++){const angle=i/30000*Math.PI*2;const radius=20;orbitPos[i*3]=Math.cos(angle)*radius;orbitPos[i*3+1]=Math.sin(angle)*radius;orbitPos[i*3+2]=Math.sin(angle)*radius*0.1;orbitCol[i*3]=1.0;orbitCol[i*3+1]=0.7;orbitCol[i*3+2]=0.5;}orbitGeom.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(orbitPos,3));orbitGeom.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(orbitCol,3));const orbitMat=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:0.3,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:0.5});const orbitPoints=new THREE.Points(orbitGeom,orbitMat);group.add(orbitPoints);return group;}/**
 * 4️⃣ 원자 형성 (보어 모델)
 * 작은 원자핵 주변을 전자껍질이 감싸는 구조
 */export function createStage3_AtomFormation(){const group=new THREE.Group();const time=Date.now()*0.001;// 매우 작은 원자핵 (중앙)
const coreGeom=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const numCore=100000;const corePos=new Float32Array(numCore*3);const coreCol=new Float32Array(numCore*3);for(let i=0;i<numCore;i++){const r=Math.pow(Math.random(),0.33)*3;const theta=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;const phi=Math.random()*Math.PI;corePos[i*3]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.cos(theta);corePos[i*3+1]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.sin(theta);corePos[i*3+2]=r*Math.cos(phi);coreCol[i*3]=1.0;coreCol[i*3+1]=1.0;coreCol[i*3+2]=0.3;}coreGeom.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(corePos,3));coreGeom.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(coreCol,3));const coreMat=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:0.6,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:1.0});const corePoints=new THREE.Points(coreGeom,coreMat);group.add(corePoints);// 3개 전자 껍질 (K, L, M)
const shells=[{radius:20,color:[0.2,0.8,1.0],count:80000},{radius:40,color:[0.5,0.9,1.0],count:100000},{radius:60,color:[0.7,0.95,1.0],count:80000}];shells.forEach((shell,shellIdx)=>{const geom=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const pos=new Float32Array(shell.count*3);const col=new Float32Array(shell.count*3);for(let i=0;i<shell.count;i++){const baseAngle=i/shell.count*Math.PI*2;const angle=baseAngle+time*(shellIdx+1)*0.3;const tilt=i/shell.count*Math.PI*0.3;pos[i*3]=Math.cos(angle)*shell.radius;pos[i*3+1]=Math.sin(angle)*shell.radius*Math.cos(tilt);pos[i*3+2]=Math.sin(angle)*shell.radius*Math.sin(tilt);col[i*3]=shell.color[0];col[i*3+1]=shell.color[1];col[i*3+2]=shell.color[2];}geom.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(pos,3));geom.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(col,3));const mat=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:0.2,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:0.7});const points=new THREE.Points(geom,mat);group.add(points);});group.userData.isAnimated=true;return group;}// 단계 정보
export const educationalBigBangStages=[{id:0,name:"쿼크-글루온 플라즈마",timeRange:"10⁻¹² 초",description:"우주 극초기 - 극도로 뜨거운 상태"},{id:1,name:"양성자/중성자 형성",timeRange:"10⁻⁶ 초",description:"쿼크들이 결합하기 시작"},{id:2,name:"핵융합 → 원자핵",timeRange:"1-3 분",description:"헬륨-4, 리튬 등 형성"},{id:3,name:"원자 형성",timeRange:"38만 년",description:"전자가 원자핵 주변을 돌기 시작"}];// 모든 단계를 생성하는 함수
export function createAllStages(){return[createStage0_QuarkGluonPlasma(),createStage1_QuarkCombination(),createStage2_Nucleosynthesis(),createStage3_AtomFormation()];}
